1200004103.english: I'll play that later if I have time, and I'll do more important things now.
1200004103.korean: 그건 나중에 시간 남으면 틀어주고 더 중요한 일을 하죠.

1200004104.english: Let's tell listeners around the world how great Orca is!
1200004104.korean: 오르카가 얼마나 좋은 지 세계의 청취자 여러분들께 알려드리죠!

1200004106.english: I've mentioned it several times on the broadcast myself, but what do you like, Blind Princess?
1200004106.korean: 지금까지 저도 방송에서 여러 번 알려드렸는데 블라인드 프린세스 씨께서는 뭐가 좋으신가요?

1200004107.english: Hmm... the most fundamental thing is...

1200004109.english: It's not even comparable to when I was in England.
1200004109.korean: 영국에 있을 때랑은 비교도 안 되고.

1200004110.english: Even compared to before the destruction.

1200004111.english: Before the destruction, I was treated quite well, considering I was a relatively expensive android...
1200004111.korean: 멸망 전의 저는 그래도 나름 비싼 바이오로이드라고 이래저래 많이 대우 받았지만…

1200004112.english: Still, the limitations of being a Bio-Android were clear.

1200004113.english: However, in Orca, those limitations have been significantly expanded.
1200004113.korean: 하지만 오르카에서는 그 한계가 많이 확장되었어요.

1200004114.english: What reveals that most starkly... is probably love, right?
1200004114.korean: 그것을 가장 극명하게 드러내는 것은… 아무래도 사랑이겠죠?

1200004115.english: Before the apocalypse, I wouldn't have been able to love like this.
1200004115.korean: 멸망 전의 저라면 이렇게 사랑을 할 수 없었을 거예요.

1200004116.english: Not because she's an actress, but because she's a bio-android...

1200004117.english: But... hehe, in Orca... there's someone I love, and someone who loves me.
1200004117.korean: 하지만… 후후, 오르카에서는… 제가 사랑하고, 저를 사랑해주는 분이 있죠.

1200004118.english: Anything beyond this would be a scandal, so I'll omit it.
1200004118.korean: 이 이상은 스캔들이 될 테니 생략.

1200004119.english: Only one person is likely to be involved in a scandal, but out of respect, let's just move on.
1200004119.korean: 스캔들 생길 사람은 한 사람뿐이겠지만… 존중하는 차원에서 넘어가도록 하죠.

1200004122.english: Soju, beer, wine, kvass, vodka, whiskey, rum, tequila, absinthe! And countless other drinks too!
1200004122.korean: 소주, 맥주, 와인, 크바스, 보드카, 위스키, 럼, 데킬라, 압생트! 그 외에도 수많은 술들!

1200004123.english: Especially the Circe Special, which you can only drink at Orca, is completely unmatched by any drink from the past.
1200004123.korean: 특히나 오르카에서만 마실 수 있는 키르케 스페셜은 과거 그 어떤 술과 비교해도 전혀 뒤지지 않아요.

1200004124.english: In that spirit, I brought a few bottles here, so why don't you have a drink with me, Orange Seed?
1200004124.korean: 그런 의미에서 여기 몇 병 가지고 왔으니 오렌지 씨도 같이 한잔 하시죠!

1200004125.english: It's changed a lot from the original plan, but...

1200004126.english: This orange! A professional broadcaster who caters to any guest's needs!
1200004126.korean: 이 오렌지! 게스트의 어떤 요구도 응해주는 프로 방송인!

1200004127.english: For a snack, I'll sneak out the treats I hid to eat secretly!
1200004127.korean: 안주로 제가 몰래 먹으려고 숨겨 둔 간식을 꺼내죠!

1200004129.english: Please call me Bluff. Merlin calls me so often, it feels like it's been a long time.
1200004129.korean: 블프로 불러주세요. 멀린이 길다고 이렇게 자주 불러요.

1200004130.english: Then please call me Orange too.

1200004132.english: Black Friday... you spent a lot of good time with the commander, didn't you?
1200004132.korean: 블프는… 사령관님이랑 좋은 시간 많이 보내셨죠오?

1200004134.english: The commander is so good that...

1200004135.english: They know I can't see, so they always bring me ASMR, delicious or fragrant things, or things that feel good to the touch.
1200004135.korean: 제가 눈이 안 보이는 걸 잘 알고 있어서 ASMR이나 맛있거나 향기로운 것, 감촉이 좋은 것을 맨날 가져다 준답니다.

1200004137.english: Even when we went on dates before, you always tried your best to accommodate me.
1200004137.korean: 전에 저랑 데이트를 할 때에도 최대한 저에게 맞춰주시고요오.

1200004138.english: And when the secret hours of the night come…

1200004141.english: I think I can do stage 3 now.
1200004141.korean: 이제 3단계 할 수 있을 거 같아요.

1200004143.english: Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Show me!
1200004143.korean: 네! 네! 네! 네! 네! 네! 네! 네! 네! 네! 네! 네! 네! 네! 네에! 보여주세요오~!

1200004144.english: I knew it, that's why I brought the uniform here...

1200004145.english: I brought an extra set as a backup. Would you like to try the orange one too?
1200004145.korean: 예비로 한 세트 더 가져왔는데, 오랑지도 입어보실래요?

1200004146.english: Really? Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Me! Me! I'd like to try it on!
1200004146.korean: 정말요오? 네! 네! 네! 네! 네! 네! 네! 네! 저요! 저요! 입어볼래요!

1200004149.english: Those two... are you sure it's okay to leave them like that?
1200004149.korean: 저 둘… 저렇게 둬도 되는 것이더냐?

1200004151.english: It's a recorded broadcast anyway, so we can edit it later.
1200004151.korean: 어차피 녹음 방송이라 나중에 편집하면 되니까요.

1200004152.english: Still... wouldn't it be a waste of time, and wouldn't it make those two's habits worse?
1200004152.korean: 그래도… 괜한 시간 낭비에 저 둘의 버릇이 나빠지지 않겠더냐?

1200004153.english: That's true, but I'm trying to see it now while I can. Because you'll miss it later.
1200004153.korean: 그렇긴 하겠지만 지금은 봐 둘 수 있을 때 봐두려고요. 나중에 그리워질 테니까요.
